text: Standing outside the glass-walled room, I experience a gentle sense of anticipation. The modern environment, with its clean lines and open space, feels both welcoming and enigmatic—an invitation to enter a realm of ideas. As I step closer and observe the "R+D" wall with its vivid colors and thought-provoking displays, I am quietly inspired. The text about philosophical wonder resonates with me. I feel both part of and apart from the scene—a visitor poised between curiosity and contemplation, ready to engage in a conversation about what it means to question and discover.
